title: landolphia villosa
intro: Landolphia villosa, also known as the hairy landolphia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic effects. The health benefits of Landolphia villosa include treating fever, pain, and digestive issues, as well as being used as an antivenom. Herbal preparations of Landolphia villosa can be made into a paste or powder, which can be applied topically or ingested after proper administration and dosage.
